jokes.text: I'm fat.
jokes.setup: Traditional Catholic confession setting with formal religious language
jokes.punchline: Mac's 'sin' is simply being fat, treating weight gain as a moral failing
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy and subversion of confession format. The deadpan delivery and religious context make this absurd confession hilarious.

jokes.text: Oh, great and angry God, I command thee to smite my friends!
jokes.setup: Mac continuing his confession
jokes.punchline: Treating God like a vengeful genie he can command to attack his friends
jokes.explanation: Classic Mac's misunderstanding of religion combined with his pettiness. The formal language makes it funnier.

jokes.text: So, really, I'd like to confess on them, because they're sinners and pricks.
jokes.setup: Mac explaining his desire to smite his friends
jokes.punchline: Completely misunderstanding confession as tattling to God
jokes.explanation: Good character work showing Mac's selfishness and religious misunderstanding, though not groundbreaking.

jokes.text: Son, I don't think you understand the purpose of confession.
jokes.setup: Mac's completely wrong approach to confession
jokes.punchline: Priest's understated response to Mac's insanity
jokes.explanation: Solid straight-man reaction but fairly standard.

jokes.text: What the shit is going on around here?
jokes.setup: Frank enters to find the bar packed
jokes.punchline: His bewildered reaction to unexpected success
jokes.explanation: Standard Frank reaction, mildly funny but not exceptional.

jokes.text: It's like that book The Tipping Point.
jokes.setup: Dennis trying to explain their sudden success
jokes.punchline: Reference to Malcolm Gladwell's business book in this chaotic bar context
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Dennis's pseudo-intellectualism.

jokes.text: I'm like the cute, funny waitress who has all these one-liners and hilarious jabs I throw at the customers
jokes.setup: Dee explaining her contribution to the bar's success
jokes.punchline: Dee's delusional view of herself as charming when she's actually abrasive
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dee delusion - thinking she's charming when she's terrible.

jokes.text: No matter how psychotically vain... or needy and pathetic or, I mean, just plain sad.
jokes.setup: Charlie trying to encourage everyone to keep doing what they're doing
jokes.punchline: Accidentally describing his friends' terrible qualities while trying to be supportive
jokes.explanation: Excellent Charlie moment - accidentally brutal honesty while trying to be encouraging.

jokes.text: What are you looking to do? Like, flash-cook a-a gyro sandwich?
jokes.setup: Frank's plan to put M-80s in lamb
jokes.punchline: Charlie's matter-of-fact interpretation of Frank's insane explosive cooking method
jokes.explanation: Great absurdist logic - Charlie treating explosive cooking as a reasonable culinary technique.

jokes.text: A meat bomb!
jokes.setup: Charlie's gyro sandwich interpretation
jokes.punchline: Frank's excited embrace of the 'meat bomb' concept
jokes.explanation: Frank's enthusiasm for destructive cooking is perfectly in character.

jokes.text: I'm going to the crevice!
jokes.setup: Charlie getting frustrated with Frank's meat bomb talk
jokes.punchline: Charlie threatening to retreat to 'the crevice' - some mysterious hiding place
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Charlie absurdism - 'the crevice' as his escape destination is perfectly weird and quotable.

jokes.text: Charlie, don't go in the crevice.
jokes.setup: Charlie threatening the crevice
jokes.punchline: Frank treating 'the crevice' as a real place Charlie shouldn't go
jokes.explanation: Frank's acceptance of Charlie's weird logic amplifies the absurdity.

jokes.text: Kids these days, they have so many more choices than we had when we were little. Am I right?
jokes.setup: Dee trying to do comedy while customers wait for drinks
jokes.punchline: Generic, unfunny observational humor that goes nowhere
jokes.explanation: The joke is that it's not funny - Dee's terrible comedy attempt while neglecting customers.

jokes.text: Well, they're not landing because I'm not getting to the punch line
jokes.setup: Customer telling Dee her jokes aren't landing
jokes.punchline: Dee blaming the audience for not letting her finish terrible jokes
jokes.explanation: Good cringe comedy - Dee's delusion about her comedy skills.

jokes.text: I drank three bottles of champagne and hung out with a stray dog all night under a bridge
jokes.setup: Mac explaining why he slept in
jokes.punchline: Casually mentioning spending the night under a bridge with a stray dog
jokes.explanation: Perfect absurdist detail delivered matter-of-factly, very quotable.

jokes.text: your jokes never land, all right? So please don't concentrate on your comedy anymore, 'cause it's terrible
jokes.setup: Mac getting frustrated with Dee's comedy focus
jokes.punchline: Mac's brutal honesty about Dee's terrible comedy
jokes.explanation: Good character dynamics - Mac's rare moment of clarity about Dee.

jokes.text: I'm bashing it.
jokes.setup: Dennis locked in bathroom for an hour
jokes.punchline: Dennis's cryptic explanation of 'bashing' his appearance
jokes.explanation: Great setup for the reveal of Dennis's painted hair disaster.

jokes.text: I saw a couple gray hairs, and I was, like, 'I'll eradicate those,' and then...
jokes.setup: Dennis explaining his bathroom activities
jokes.punchline: Dennis used black paint on his hair to 'eradicate' gray hairs
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis vanity taken to absurd extremes - paint as hair dye.

jokes.text: You look like Superman.
jokes.setup: Dennis's black-painted hair disaster
jokes.punchline: Mac's sarcastic comparison to Superman
jokes.explanation: Good reaction to the visual gag but fairly standard.

jokes.text: Oh, shit. Maybe that's Superman.
jokes.setup: Mac calling him Superman sarcastically
jokes.punchline: Dennis taking it seriously and thinking he could fool people
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis delusion - believing his paint job could fool people.

jokes.text: I got some donuts and some M&Ms and some, uh, chips. I could pass them through if you want some.
jokes.setup: Mac eating in the confessional
jokes.punchline: Offering junk food to the priest through the confession screen
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist moment - treating confession like a casual snack break.

jokes.text: Are you eating in there?
jokes.setup: Mac is supposed to be confessing his sins
jokes.punchline: The priest hears him eating snacks during confession
jokes.explanation: Shows Mac's complete lack of respect for religious ritual. The priest's patience is wearing thin.

jokes.text: Hey, that's good. You want to do that to people?
jokes.setup: Frank hitting Charlie with a stick
jokes.punchline: Frank's excitement about weaponizing the stick for customers
jokes.explanation: Classic Frank - turning accidental violence into a business plan.

jokes.text: Frank, you've just created a four-way intersection. If anything, you've made this intersection safer.
jokes.setup: Frank adding extra stop signs to create chaos
jokes.punchline: Charlie's logical explanation of why Frank's 'chaos plan' backfired
jokes.explanation: Excellent logic joke - Charlie's rare moment of clarity destroying Frank's 'plan'.

jokes.text: Dee is guilty of sloth, and she's pro-abortion.
jokes.setup: Mac asking if laziness is a sin
jokes.punchline: Mac casually adding that Dee is pro-abortion as additional sin evidence
jokes.explanation: Good Mac moment - casually throwing in political views as sins.

jokes.text: I don't want to go to any poor places, you know. Successful guy like myself, I'll have a target on my back.
jokes.setup: Mac planning his sailing route
jokes.punchline: Mac thinking he's so successful he'd be targeted in poor countries
jokes.explanation: Good Mac delusion about his wealth and status.

jokes.text: You're just going to sail around the United States is what it looks like.
jokes.setup: Mac avoiding everywhere on his sailing map
jokes.punchline: Dee pointing out Mac's 'world sailing' is just coastal US
jokes.explanation: Good visual gag payoff - Mac's 'adventurous' sailing is completely safe.

jokes.text: I got a chemical peel.
jokes.setup: Dennis hiding under covers looking terrible
jokes.punchline: Dennis's casual explanation for his destroyed face
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of Dennis's vanity - from paint to chemical peels.

jokes.text: I was just trying to live up to all of your expectations of me. Physical perfection.
jokes.setup: Dennis explaining his appearance obsession
jokes.punchline: Dennis thinking others expect physical perfection from him
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis narcissism - imagining everyone expects perfection from him.

jokes.text: it looks like you're wearing a mask of yourself over your face. Not a good one.
jokes.setup: Dennis's chemical peel disaster
jokes.punchline: Mac's specific description of how bad Dennis looks
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly specific insult with great visual imagery. Very quotable.

jokes.text: When I leave the gym, and I have a full pump...
jokes.setup: Dee saying Mac never looked like the muscular avatar
jokes.punchline: Mac's delusional belief about his post-workout appearance
jokes.explanation: Standard Mac fitness delusion but good character work.

jokes.text: Father, when Peter did the statue of David, he wasn't just hammering at pebbles. First, he ordered the Jews to bring him a massive slab of marble.
jokes.setup: Priest asking if Mac went to the gym
jokes.punchline: Mac's completely wrong art history analogy comparing himself to Michelangelo
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Mac moment - wrong artist, wrong statue, antisemitic assumptions, perfect analogy for eating to gain weight. Exceptionally quotable.

jokes.text: I dip it in bleach, then it's clean!
jokes.setup: Customer complaining drink tastes like bleach
jokes.punchline: Charlie's insane cleaning method using bleach as dishwasher
jokes.explanation: Perfect Charlie logic - poisoning customers with cleaning efficiency.

jokes.text: Because I'm dipping them in bleach so that I can clean them faster. I don't have time to wash every single glass. I dip it in bleach, then it's clean!
jokes.setup: Customer complaining drink tastes like bleach
jokes.punchline: Charlie explains his efficient but dangerous cleaning method
jokes.explanation: Perfect Charlie logic - dangerous efficiency over basic safety

jokes.text: Then get out of my bar! Get out of my bar!
jokes.setup: Customer refusing to drink bleach
jokes.punchline: Charlie angrily kicks out customer for refusing poisoned drink
jokes.explanation: Charlie's misdirected anger at reasonable customer complaint

jokes.text: I'm running at of ten of excellence, and I'm used to being at whatever number.
jokes.setup: Dennis explaining his pressure from success
jokes.punchline: Dennis can't even articulate his normal low level of performance
jokes.explanation: Good Dennis moment - accidentally admitting his usual incompetence.

jokes.text: ♪ Big, fat, big, fat Big, fat titties Big, fat ass. ♪
jokes.setup: Gang getting high and abandoning responsibilities
jokes.punchline: Improvised song mocking Mac's weight gain
jokes.explanation: Juvenile humor but serves the cringe comedy of the characters being cruel.

jokes.text: But you have candy coming out of your pocket.
jokes.setup: Mac defending his weight gain efforts
jokes.punchline: Visual evidence of Mac's constant snacking
jokes.explanation: Good visual gag undermining Mac's self-defense.

jokes.text: if I smite your friends and absolve you, will you leave?
jokes.setup: Mac's entire confused confession
jokes.punchline: Priest's complete surrender and willingness to fake religious powers to get rid of Mac
jokes.explanation: Excellent payoff - priest completely breaking character to escape Mac's insanity.

jokes.text: When does the spell kick in? When is God going to shed some of this weight for me?
jokes.setup: Priest fake-absolving Mac
jokes.punchline: Mac treating religious absolution like a weight-loss spell
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mac moment - completely misunderstanding religion as magic.

jokes.text: glory unto you, ghost man in the sky, that created us all and pre-determines everything.
jokes.setup: Mac trying to be religious
jokes.punchline: Mac's completely wrong understanding of Catholic theology
jokes.explanation: Good Mac religious misunderstanding - mixing up denominations and calling God 'ghost man'.
